calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-21-2010 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Meng Chu, is present.
Attorney, Paul Perdue, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Lili Sun, is present.
Attorney, Svetlana Rishine , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Penelope Pahl, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of OCT-25-2010 is vacated.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
